REPLY IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIKOLAKAKIS, KAREN

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF KAREN NIKOLAKAKIS' NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FROM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. FRITZ PROPERTY GROUP HAS SELECTIVELY DISCLOSED LIMITED INFORMATION ABOUT INSURANCE COVERAGE. EVEN IF THE COVERAGE OF THE PRINCIPAL CARRIER DISCLOSED BY FRITZ PROPERTY GROUP IS ADEQUATE TO SATISFY A JUDGMENT FOR THE PLAINTIFF, IT IS BEYOND THE PROVINCE OF THE COURT TO SPECULATE ABOUT THE ROLE VARIOUS POTENTIALLY INSURANCE COVERAGE WILL PLAY IN THE RESOLUTION OF THE CASE. WITHIN 10 DAYS, FRITZ PROPERTY GROUP SHALL PROVIDE A FURTHER RESPONSE TO FORM INTERROGATORIES SET ONE, NO. 4.1 BY RESPONDING FULLY TO THE REQUEST WITH INFORMATION REGARDING ALL INSURANCE POLICIES UNDER FRITZ PROPERTY GROUP, INC. WAS INSURED OR MIGHT BE INSURED FOR THE CLAIMS AND DAMAGES ARISING FROM THE INCIDENT ALLEGED IN PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT, INCLUDING PRIMARY, EXCESS AND UMBRELLA POLICIES. MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-11-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To From Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF KAREN NIKOLAKAKIS' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To From Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions is granted. Fritz Property Group has selectively disclosed limited information about insurance coverage. Even if the coverage of the principal carrier disclosed by Fritz Property Group is adequate to satisfy a judgment for the plaintiff, it is beyond the province of the court to speculate about the role various potentially insurance coverage will play in the resolution of the case. Within 10 days, Fritz Property Group shall provide a further response to Form Interrogatories Set One, no. 4.1 by responding fully to the request with information regarding all insurance policies under Fritz Property Group, Inc. was insured or might be insured for the claims and damages arising from the incident alleged in Plaintiff's complaint, including primary, excess and umbrella policies. Monetary sanctions are denied. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
